case.title: ILLINOIS CENTRAL RAILROAD CO. v. CITY OF SHIVELY

opinion.h1: ILLINOIS CENTRAL RAILROAD CO. v. CITY OF SHIVELY, 369 U.S. 120 (1962)
opinion.h4: ILLINOIS CENTRAL RAILROAD CO. v. CITY OF SHIVELY. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF KENTUCKY. No. 654. Decided March 5, 1962.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
James W. Stites, Joseph H. Wright and John W. Freels for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
